title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Educational video explaining how diffusion models work as a process and framework rather than a fixed architecture. Covers the theory, history, strengths and weaknesses of diffusion, including implementations like Diffusion Transformers (DiT) that combine diffusion with transformer architectures.
